_comment: Execution-result status mapping for the Reporter's TestLink sync (Phase 2 TG10). Maps a test case's run outcome to a TestLink execution status. The outcome key is either the special 'passed'/'skipped' (no failure entry, or a skipped test) or one of the failure-analysis classification values. Human-editable; the Reporter/script MUST NOT hardcode any of this. TestLink statuses: Pass, Fail, Blocked, Not Run. See docs/testlink-integration.md section 6 and phase2-integrations.md TG10.
_default_comment: Used when an outcome key is not found in the map above (e.g. a future classification value). Blocked is the safe default — it flags the case for a human in TestLink rather than silently passing or failing it.

testlink_statuses._comment: Reference only: the TestLink reportTCResult status codes the names map to.
